dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses moving_average_period of 40 days, mapped to sma_40. Price reference is close price. Direction is context-dependent: long entries on crosses above the MA, short entries on crosses below. Exit conditions are reversal crossovers (opposite of entry). Target regime set to TRENDING modes as per original specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses moving_average_period of 40 days, mapped to sma_40. Price reference is close price. Direction is context-dependent: long entries on crosses above the MA, short entries on crosses below. Exit conditions are reversal crossovers (opposite of entry). Target regime set to TRENDING modes as per original specification.

source_rule_text: Buy when prices cross above the moving average trendline; sell short when prices cross below the moving average trendline.
